description: The realtime kanban board for workgroups built with React and Redux.
tagline: Free open source kanban board for workgroups.
author: BigBearTechWorld

tips.before_install:
🆕 PLANKA V2 - SEPARATE APP

This is a NEW app, separate from 'planka' (v1). Both can run simultaneously.

FOR NEW USERS:
✅ Install this app for new Planka deployments
✅ Modern v2 architecture with unified data directory
✅ Enhanced security (SSRF protection)
✅ New features: user mentions, task linking, webhooks UI, SMTP UI

FOR V1 USERS:
⚠️  Do NOT uninstall your 'planka' v1 app
⚠️  Deploy this as a NEW app alongside v1
⚠️  Migration is ONE-WAY with NO ROLLBACK
⚠️  Requires manual data migration: https://docs.planka.cloud/docs/upgrade-to-v2/docker/
⚠️  Must be on v1 >= 1.26.2, subdomain hosting required

Detailed migration guide: https://community.bigbeartechworld.com/t/added-planka-to-bigbearcasaos/924

title: Planka v2
